column3: Nutmeg & Mace Tea is a unique blend of tea, which combines the flavors of nutmeg and mace spices to create an aromatic and delightful beverage often consumed for its warming properties during colder months.
Nutmeg & Mace Tincture is a form of herbal remedy prepared from infusing nutmeg and mace spices in an alcohol solution, creating a potent extract that can be used for various medicinal purposes.

Nutmeg & Mace Capsules is a supplement containing concentrated forms of nutmeg and mace, spices commonly used for their various health benefits such as improving digestion, enhancing immunity, and reducing inflammation when consumed regularly.

Nutmeg & Mace Essential Oil is a concentrated product acquired through steam distillation or extraction process that features two spices, nutmeg and mace, both of which provide distinctive flavors and aromas used in various culinary and natural healing applications.

Nutmeg & Mace Poultice is a mixture of finely ground spices - nutmeg and mace - that is often combined with other ingredients, then applied as a warm compress on affected areas to soothe pain, reduce inflammation, and promote healing.

Nutmeg & Mace Salve is a unique concoction made from combining nurturing essential oils derived from nutmeg and mace spices, carefully blended to create an exquisite remedy for various ailments including body discomforts, skin care treatments, and more.

Nutmeg & Mace Powder is a combination of two unique, finely ground spices obtained from the seeds of Myristica fragrans and Myristica malabarica trees, which are often used in various culinary applications for their aromatic qualities.

Nutmeg & Mace Decoction is a herbal mixture made by boiling and steeping nutmeg and mace, two spices known for their medicinal properties, to create a potent liquid extract which is believed to offer various health benefits when consumed.

Nutmeg & Mace Infusion is a flavorful blend of two aromatic spices, nutmeg and mace, which are soaked and steeped together in order to extract their unique essences, creating a rich and complex infused mixture used for culinary purposes such as adding depth and warmth to various dishes.

Nutmeg & Mace Extract is a combination of two spices, nutmeg and mace, which are derived from the same seed, ground together to form an aromatic paste that is commonly used in various dishes as a flavoring agent.
